{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es esmu darrijs to Sem-
mi/ un tohs Zikwekus/ un tohs
Lohpus/ kas Semmes Wirfū
irr/ zaur mannu leelu Spehku/
un zaur mannu issteepu Elko-
nu/ un es dohnu to tam/ kam
(dohi) es pareist schkittischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ es esmu wiſtas
schahs Semmes NebukadNeza-
rain tam Kehnixaim no Babe-
les/ mannam Kalpam Rohkā
dewis/ fr patt tehs Swehrus
Laufā eſmu es dewis winnam
kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſseem Laudim buhs
winnam/ un winna Dehtam/
un winna Dehta Dehtam kal-
poht/ teekams tas Laiks winna
Semmes arridsan nahks/ tad
likfees leelas Tantas/ un feeli
Kehnint no winna kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Laudis un ta War-
kiba/ kas winnam/ Nebukad-
Nezarani tam Kehnixaim no
Babeles ne kalpoht/ un kas fa-
wu Raflu ne grib appakſch to
Juhgin ta Kehnixa no Babeles
ikt/ to pakhu Taufu peemekle-
schu es ar Sobbinu/un ar Bad-
rit/ un ar Mehri/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Teekams es teem
aur winna Rohku buhschu Gal-
u darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs tad ne klausait juh-
eem Praweescheem/ un juhfeem
Sihlneefeem/ un juhfeem Sap-
otajeem/ un juhfeem Laika-Zee-
itajeem/ un juhfeem Burw-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee fluddina jums
Mellus/ tadeht ka tee juhs tah-
tu no juhsas Semmes afschkirr/
un es juhs tsdsennu / un juhs
bohjā eetat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Laudis/tas fawu
Raflu padohs tam Juhgain ta
Kehntxa no Babelēs/ un win-
xam kalpoht/ tohs likſchu es fa-
wa Semmē palikt / fakka tas
KUNGS: Un tee to apfohps/
un eekſch tahs dshwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es runnaju pehz wiſ-
feem scheem Wahrdein us to
Kehnixu Zedekiju/ to Kehntxu no
Juhda/ un tazziju: Padohdeet
juhsus Raflus tam Juhgain ta
Kehntxa no Babelēs/ un kalpo-
jiet winnam / un winna Lau-
dim/ tad juhs dshwofeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kapehz juhs mirſeef? tu
un tawi Laudis zaur Sobbinu/
zaur Baddu/ un zaur Mehrie
Ka tas KUNGS irr runnajs no
teem Laudim/ kas tam Kehnt-
Rain no Babelēs ne kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne klanfajt tad to Pra-
weechu Wahrdus/ kas us jums
runna/ un fakka: Juhs ne kalpo-
feet tam Kehnixaim no Babelēs/
io tee fluddina jums Mellus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es ne esmu tohs fuβ-
tijs/ fakka tas KUNGS: Un tee
fluddina eekſch manna Wahrdā
Mellus/ tadeht ka es juhs tsdsen-
nu/ un juhs bohjā eetat/ juhs un
"
    }
